body.notes: Add idle detection (IGOR_CONSOLIDATION_IDLE_MIN, default 20min) + deep NE pass to narrative_engine.py. Deep pass: all TWM obs (not just top), LTM promotion at 0.5 threshold, episodic cluster -> SEMANTIC abstraction, weak link pruning (weight<0.05 after 10d), call integrate_reading() for unembedded nodes, call run_node_adoption() (check IGOR_NODE_ADOPTION_ENABLED gate). Log to cognition_metrics.log. yield on interactive turn mid-pass. consolidation.py is READ-ONLY context — do not modify it. Call surfaces confirmed stable by Igor.
body.title: #310 Night consolidation mode — NE idle detection + deep pass
body.result: Night consolidation mode implemented (#310). NarrativeEngine gains notify_interactive() (resets idle timer on each interactive turn), is_consolidation_eligible() (checks IGOR_CONSOLIDATION_IDLE_MIN env, default 20min), and _deep_consolidation_pass() (5-step: TWM promotion at 0.5 threshold, episodic merge at 0.80 cosine, weak link pruning via cortex._conn(), orphan adoption batch=100, reading integration batch=50). main.py wires notify_interactive() at turn start and _run_ne_deep_consolidation() in background loop. Import-tested and idle-detection logic verified.
